text.title: Asset Harvest Checklist Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns commonly observed in shipped asset-harvest-checklist work. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Launch tweet shows a blank card; engagement halves vs the brand norm.
antipattern.root-cause: og:image not generated; default crawl falls back to logo or nothing.
antipattern.fix: Require og:image-1200x630 as required_by_launch=true. See rule og-and-favicon-not-optional.

antipattern.symptom: GDPR complaint filed three weeks after launch; analytics script fires before consent banner shown.
antipattern.fix: Both required_by_launch=true OR neither shipped. See rule analytics-consent-paired.

antipattern.symptom: Two days before launch, three items show source=TBD; designer is on holiday; team scrambles.
antipattern.root-cause: Checklist treated as documentation, not action list.
antipattern.fix: Block ANY source=TBD; require concrete URL/path/script at addition time. See rule every-item-has-source.

antipattern.symptom: Checklist only lists visual + analytics; legal page slips; cookie banner ships without privacy link.
antipattern.root-cause: Author skipped two categories thinking they were already done.
antipattern.fix: Validator enforces all 5 categories present. See rule five-category-coverage.
